name: Haruto
description: Haruto, like most Japanese given names, has no single fixed meaning — the reading can be written with many different kanji combinations, each carrying its own sense. The most common pairing joins 陽 (haru, 'sun,' 'sunny') with 翔 (to, 'to soar'), read together as something like 'soaring sun,' but 春 (haru, 'spring') and other characters for -to are also in wide use.
